data.title: Trump to Address Iran Proposal ‘Soon’ as Oil Rises Further
data.description: President Donald Trump said Iran has asked the US to lift a naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz while the two sides negotiate an end to the two-month war, which has upended global energy supplies.
data.keywords: Iran,Donald John Trump,War,Generic 1st 'CL' Future,United Arab Emirates,Organization of the Petroleum Exporting Countries,Pakistan,National Security,White House,Tehran,world,politics,markets
